ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training session took place */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the training session */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain type (e.g., flat, hilly) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who led the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., endurance, sprint) */,
  "session_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the training session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the session (e.g., focus areas, key takeaways) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclists" (
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyclist */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the cyclist */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the cyclist */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the cyclist in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the cyclist in kg */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the cyclist belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cyclist */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the cyclist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyclist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cyclist */,
  "watts_per_kilo" REAL /* Power output in watts per kilogram */,
  "co_operation" REAL /* Degree of collaboration with teammates (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics that could influence performance (e.g., terrain, weather) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the cyclist during the session */,
  "cadence" INTEGER /* Cadence of the cyclist during the session */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the cyclist during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_cyclist_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclist_id") REFERENCES cyclists ("cyclist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the coach (e.g., USAC, USA Cycling) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, athlete, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES cyclists ("cyclist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log was created */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the session (e.g., performance insights, issues) */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who logged the entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., pre-session, post-session) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training plan */,
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cyclist */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the training plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the training plan */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training plan */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_plans_cyclist_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclist_id") REFERENCES cyclists ("cyclist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "predicted_rank" INTEGER /* Predicted rank of the team */,
  "predicted_time" TEXT /* Predicted time of the team */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)
